news.title: NRW News - updates overview
news.description: Updates from the NRW world, new features, product changes, and important news in one place.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: A short overview of how we process personal data in NRW. Updated: March 9, 2026.

items.account: Account data: email, username, account identifier.
items.profile: Profile data: name, bio, avatar, and profile settings.
items.content: Content: messages, posts, and uploaded media, depending on what you share.
items.love: nLove data: age, identity, preferences (who you're looking for and what you're looking for), distance, swipes, matches, and nLove photos.
items.location: Location data for nLove: approximate location, geohash, measurement accuracy, and update timestamps.
items.superLikes: Super Like credits and order data, if the feature is active.
items.support: Support communication: message content and device metadata when contacting support.
items.technical: Technical data: device, IP address, access logs, and security events.

items.service: Operating the service, delivering messages, and personalizing content.
items.matching: nLove matching, showing relevant profiles, and creating matches.
items.realtime: Realtime synchronization, for example new matches, chat status changes, and notifications.
items.payments: Processing payments for optional features such as Super Like credits, where available.
items.analytics: Analytics to improve the app in aggregate form.
items.legal: Legal obligations and protection of rights.

items.profile: In nLove, we process profile data including age, search preferences, and relationship goals.
items.distance: We process approximate location to calculate relevance and distance.
items.swipes: We store swipe actions (`pass`, `like`, `superlike`) and matching (`match`).
items.chat: When a match is mutual, a direct chat may be created automatically.
items.photos: nLove photos are stored as publicly accessible URLs within the service.

items.credits: If paid features are active, we track credit balances and order history.
items.provider: Payment details may be processed by an external payment provider, for example Stripe.
items.metadata: Within NRW, we mainly store technical and billing metadata for the order, such as status, amount, currency, and references.

supportMetadata.title: Support metadata
supportMetadata.body: When you send a support message, we may also store technical device context such as user agent, platform, language, time zone, screen size, and viewport size. This data is used only for troubleshooting and security.

access.title: Who has access to the data
access.body: Access is limited to authorized people and vendors necessary to operate the service, such as hosting, infrastructure, and where relevant a payment provider. We have data protection agreements in place with all partners.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: We retain data for as long as needed to operate the service or comply with legal obligations. If you delete your account, we gradually remove or anonymize the data. That includes nLove data such as profile information, swipes, and matches, along with optional location data and support metadata.

items.access: Right of access, correction, and deletion.
items.restriction: Right to restriction of processing and data portability.

items.copy: How do I get a copy of my data? Email support@nrw.app.
items.delete: How do I delete my account? Contact support or use your account settings.
items.sharing: Do you share data with third parties? Only with partners required to run the service.
items.location: How do I turn off nLove location? Disable location sharing in nLove settings.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Basic rules for using the NRW service. Updated: March 9, 2026.

items.security: You are responsible for keeping your account secure.
items.usage: Do not use the service for illegal or harmful purposes.
items.restriction: We may restrict your account if you break the rules or the law.
items.age: You must be at least 18 years old to use nLove.

items.responsibility: You are responsible for the content you post.
items.moderation: As part of moderation, we may hide or remove content.
items.respect: Respect the rights of other users.
items.sensitive: Do not publish sensitive information you do not want to share.
items.lovePhotos: For nLove photos, you confirm that you have the right to publish and share them.

items.truthful: Fill out your nLove profile truthfully, including your age, and do not impersonate anyone else.
items.abuse: It is forbidden to use nLove for harassment, spam, or scams.
items.actions: `pass`, `like`, and `superlike` actions are used only for internal matching within NRW.
items.location: Some nLove features may require active location sharing.
items.chat: When a match is mutual, a direct chat may be created automatically.

items.creditSystem: Super Like may be tied to a credit system, where 1 Super Like uses 1 credit.
items.gateway: Credits may be available as a paid digital feature through a payment gateway such as Stripe.
items.transfer: Credits are non-transferable between accounts and can only be used within NRW.
items.billing: Billing, disputes, and refunds are governed by applicable law and the payment provider's terms.

items.chat: Use the support chat respectfully and without abuse.
items.context: When you send a message, technical device context may be attached for diagnostics.
items.thread: A closed conversation may be reopened by the system as a new thread when another message is sent.

items.harassment: No harassment, threats, or hate speech.

changes.title: Service changes
changes.body: We may update, improve, or discontinue the service over time. We will notify you about important changes.

items.abuse: What if someone abuses my account? Contact support as soon as possible.
items.delete: Can I delete my content? Yes, posts and messages will support that through the UI.
items.logout: How do I sign out of the service? Any time in your account settings.
items.location: Do I need location turned on for nLove? For some features yes, otherwise swipe may not be available.

real.title: nReal feed
real.description: NRW stories and moments with quick widgets on the side.

composer.cropHint: Drag to reposition. Pinch with two fingers or use the mouse wheel to zoom.
composer.cropAppliedNote: The crop is applied on publish. Carousel height stays stable and a single photo keeps its original ratio.

errors.imageCompressionLoad: Failed to load image for compression.
errors.videoCompressionLoad: Failed to load video for compression.
errors.uploadTransportFailed: Media upload failed because of a connection issue.
errors.videoMixed: Video cannot be combined with photos and only one video can be uploaded.
errors.unsupportedMedia: We only support images or a single video.
errors.videoTooLarge: The video is too large ({size} MB). Try lower quality or a shorter clip.
errors.textTooLong: The text is too long (max {max} characters).
errors.blockedSevere: Edit the text. It contains blocked expressions that may be offensive. If you think this is a mistake, contact support.
errors.blockedSimple: Edit the text. It contains blocked expressions.

post.followSuccess: You are now following this user.
post.deleteForbidden: You cannot delete this post, or it has already been deleted.
post.pendingDescription: Only you can see this until we approve it.

stories.loginRequired: Sign in before adding a story.
stories.invalidType: Story must be an image or a video.
stories.empty: No nStories yet. You can add the first one.

desktop.title: Fresh NRW reels
desktop.description: Short community videos and highlights. Browse it like a feed you would watch between nChat messages: fast, visual, and lively.

sidebar.ideaBody: Drop the vibe, the music, and link it to nChat.
sidebar.bridgeBody: Every clip can be shared to nChat for quick reactions from people you follow.
